title: Windows installers are getting lighter
content:
QGIS installers previously included all PROJ reprojection grids—large TIFF files totaling up to 800 MB, making the full package 1.3 GB. This caused issues for users and high server bandwidth.

Future installers will exclude these grids. QGIS can download missing grids on demand, while full offline installers remain available for those needing offline deployment.
